reason: Ripe: bungling crooks turn every step of their first heist into a kaleidoscope of catastrophic comedy
Bottle Rocket: amateur thieves fumble each bold move, making mayhem darkly funny
Mouse Hunt: two hapless heirs unleash utter chaos chasing one defiant rodent
Weekend at Bernie’s: total amateurs scramble grotesquely to cover their darkest mistake
French Kiss: luckless thieves’ clumsy tactics spiral into a comedy of bungled betrayals
Heat Wave: small‐time hustlers’ worst plan meets endless screw-ups in searing desperation
Being There: naive pawn fumbles each step, turning every clumsy plan into bleak hilarity
Quiz Show: amateurs rig the game but their every error becomes a farce of public humiliation
Copycat: rookie profiler’s chaotic first case goes sideways in deadly comedic turns
Bound: bungled crime by amateurs taps dark absurdity at every mis-timed betrayal
